import React from 'react'; import './About.css'; const stats = [ { value: '3.9', label: 'GPA' }, { value: '30+', label: 'Mailboxes migrated' }, { value: '~60%', label: 'Faster provisioning' }, { value: '~$200', label: 'Monthly savings' }, ]; export default function About() { return (

// about me

Building reliable systems,
one layer at a time.

I'm a recent Computer Science graduate from the University of Wisconsin–Stout with a concentration in Cybersecurity and Secure Software Development. I care deeply about the infrastructure layer — the servers, networks, and automation pipelines that keep everything running reliably.

I've done real production infrastructure work — designing AWS environments, hardening Linux servers, self-hosting a complete mail platform, and building monitoring and alerting systems. I'm actively looking for junior SRE, DevOps, and Cloud Infrastructure roles.

🇺🇸 F-1 STEM OPT · 3 years work authorization · No sponsorship needed

{stats.map(s => (
{s.value} {s.label}
))}
); }
